mood: Warm, trustworthy, welcoming, and community-focused. Evokes a sense of heritage, safety, and growth, fitting for a regional public school in Indonesia.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-text_primary

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode) for features/programs. Use generous gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Never perfectly symmetrical.

hero.style: Min-h-[85vh] or h-screen. Left-aligned content. Large hero image in the background with a warm gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/70 via-black/40 to-transparent) to ensure text readability.
hero.button: Solid primary background (#B24C27), rounded-full, px-8 py-4, crisp typography. Hover effect: slight scale up and bg color darken.

stats_card.style: Flat surface background (#F5F0E6), 1px border (#D8CDBD), no heavy drop shadows. Large numbers using Playfair Display in primary color (#B24C27).

general_card.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, p-8 or p-10. Hover effect: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle warm shadow.

sections.name: Navbar
sections.details: Sticky top, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80) or solid background. Contains Logo/School Name and links to About, Visi Misi, Stats, Programs.

copy.title: SMP Negeri 1 Sumber Jaya
copy.tagline: Membentuk Generasi Cerdas, Berakhlak, dan Berbudaya di Lampung Barat.

copy.heading: Selamat Datang di SMPN 1 Sumber Jaya
copy.text: Sebagai sekolah menengah pertama negeri yang berdedikasi, kami berkomitmen mencetak generasi penerus bangsa yang berkualitas, berbudi pekerti luhur, dan berdaya saing.

copy.visi_text: Terwujudnya Peserta Didik yang Beriman, Bertaqwa, Berprestasi, dan Berwawasan Lingkungan.
misi_list: Meningkatkan keimanan dan ketaqwaan kepada Tuhan YME.
Melaksanakan pembelajaran yang aktif, inovatif, kreatif, efektif dan menyenangkan.
Mendorong dan membantu siswa mengenali potensi dirinya.
Menumbuhkan penghayatan terhadap budaya bangsa dan kepedulian lingkungan.

copy.address: Jl. Banda Mulya No 72 Sukapura, Kec. Sumber Jaya, Kab. Lampung Barat, Prov. Lampung
copy.copyright: © 2026 SMP Negeri 1 Sumber Jaya. Hak Cipta Dilindungi.

hero_background.description: Schoolgirls in uniforms outdoors, capturing a welcoming school environment.

about_section.description: Modern educational building exterior representing the school.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a static React/Tailwind landing page in Javascript (.js files, NOT .tsx).
Use pure functional components in JS. No TypeScript.

Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Add `<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">` to index.html.
Configure Tailwind config to use 'Playfair Display' for sans/serif and 'Manrope' for body.
Extend Tailwind colors in tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors provided in this JSON.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or lucide-react for iconography.
Ensure high contrast for text over images. Use gradients or solid dark overlays to achieve this.
Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational sections (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta', data-testid='about-section').
Avoid generic 'tech SaaS' components. Use the warm, organic, earthy aesthetic described. Use generous padding (py-24, p-8) and organic layouts.
